compiled_state.title: Create confidence-context schema contract document
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Implementation
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md specifying the full schema for the confidence context object that will be written to the scratchpad during Phase 0.

File to create: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md

Contract document must include the following sections:
- Signal Name: CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT
- Emitter: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (Phase 0 pre-flight)
- Parser: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (Phase 2 Socratic Dialogue routing, S2 doc folder scan, S3 routing logic)
- Fields: all required fields with types and valid values:
  - dimensions: object — keyed by dimension name (stack, commands, architecture, infrastructure, ci, design, enforcement), value is confidence level
  - confidence levels: high | medium | low (string enum)
  - comfort_level: technical | non_technical (string enum)
  - detected_stack: string — output of detect-stack.sh (e.g., "node-npm", "unknown")
  - generated_at: ISO timestamp
  - update_rules: specification of how S2/S3 may update the object (append-only elevation of confidence levels; dimensions may be elevated but not lowered by downstream stories)
- Example: representative scratchpad block showing the JSON object with all 7 dimensions
- Update rules for downstream stories S2 (doc-folder scan) and S3 (routing): downstream stories may elevate confidence levels (low→medium, medium→high) based on additional evidence; may never lower a confidence level written by Phase 0

Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: the contract file exists at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md
- When: a structural marker test checks for the required sections (Signal Name, Emitter, Parser, Fields, Example, Update Rules)
- Then: all section markers are present (exit 0)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md created with all required sections
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md
- [ ] Contract includes all 7 dimension names (stack, commands, architecture, infrastructure, ci, design, enforcement)
  Verify: grep -c 'stack\|commands\|architecture\|infrastructure\|ci\|design\|enforcement' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md | grep -E '^[7-9]|^[0-9]{2}'
- [ ] Contract specifies update rules for downstream S2/S3
  Verify: grep -q 'update' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md
- [ ] Contract specifies all three confidence levels: high, medium, low
  Verify: grep -q 'high' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md && grep -q 'medium' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md && grep -q 'low' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md
- [ ] Contract specifies comfort_level field with technical/non_technical values
  Verify: grep -q 'comfort_level' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-context.md
